global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a focus on food delivery services.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food delivery with a special offer.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: A stylized logo for 'BiteRush' positioned at the top center, featuring bold typography.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label that reads 'UGC' in a simple font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Three product icons
elements.description: Three rectangular icons representing food items, arranged horizontally in the center.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small rectangular icon below the main product icons, representing additional food items.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: Another small rectangular icon below the main product icons, similar to the previous one.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Text in a bold font stating 'Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15' centered below the icons.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'BiteRush' in large, bold letters at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom center with the text 'Shop now' in a clear, inviting font.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element that adds visual interest, located at the top of the ad.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label indicating user-generated content, positioned at the top left.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, BiteRush logo, promotional text, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by the logo and discount badge, with product icons and promotional text centered, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15, BiteRush, Shop now, SALE, UGC
